tracks.title: This time
tracks.lyrics:
[00:03.22]I'm running out of time, gotta stand up now
[00:07.93]And go before I miss my last chance
[00:12.73]Jumped off that one-way train of thought
[00:15.79]Caught on the many years that went to waste
[00:22.33]Long gone are simple motives that made much sense
[00:27.13]To stay on track when nobody cared
[00:31.85]Cause I don't wanna die all alone without
[00:36.76]Allowing my true self to speak in
[00:40.66]
[00:42.46]There's a lot of things I wish I could say
[00:52.07]Had to put these words together someway
[00:56.61]It's the best I can do for now
[01:00.10]
[01:00.58]This time I promised that I wouldn't give up
[01:05.36]Inspiration lighting this fire
[01:10.10]Fed up by alter-egos braking me down
[01:15.10]They don't know I'm ready to fight back
[01:19.87]This time I'm giving away these melodies blind
[01:24.68]'Cause there's no such thing as "the right one"
[01:29.30]No way I'm ever going back after coming this far
[01:38.06]
[02:03.53]I felt like being followed around and around
[02:08.43]And barely saved me from myself
[02:12.99]That day I stopped caring about their demand
[02:17.94]Determined to embrace what I am
[02:22.15]
[02:23.65]There's a lot of things I wish I could say
[02:33.23]Had to put these words together someway
[02:37.78]It's the best I can do for now
[02:41.31]
[02:41.74]This time I promised that I wouldn't give up
[02:46.59]Inspiration lighting this fire
[02:51.35]Fed up by  alter-egos braking me down
[03:01.01]This time I'm giving away these melodies blind
[03:05.79]'Cause there's no such thing as "the right one"
[03:10.47]No way I'm ever going back after coming this far
[03:21.29]No I'm never crossing that line
